steps.title: Name the size difference
steps.content: The passage says both species were ammonites, but P. seppenradensis was much larger than P. leptophylla. The blank refers back to that difference in size.

steps.title: Reject unrelated meanings
steps.content: Choice B means hostility, Choice C means an unexpected irregularity, and Choice D means uncertainty. These do not precisely name a difference between two sizes.

steps.title: Choose difference
steps.content: Disparity means a noticeable difference, which precisely describes the size gap between the two ammonite species. The answer is A.
